DashboardPage.subtitle: Here is a summary of your design studio.

ProjectsPage.title: Projects
ProjectsPage.description: Create and manage design projects with clients, spaces, and budgets.
ProjectsPage.emptyNoProjectsDescription: Create a project to manage clients, spaces, and budgets.
ProjectsPage.emptyNoResultsDescription: Try other terms or clear filters.
ProjectsPage.confirmDeleteDescription: This action cannot be undone. All project-related data will be deleted (spaces, budgets, documents, etc.).

ClientsPage.title: Clients
ClientsPage.description: Manage your clients' contact and profile data.
ClientsPage.emptyDescription: Add your first client to link them to projects.
ClientsPage.confirmDeleteDescription: This action cannot be undone. If the client has associated projects, it cannot be deleted.
ClientsPage.toastDeleteBlocked: Cannot delete client because it has associated projects

SuppliersPage.title: Suppliers
SuppliersPage.description: Manage suppliers and their contact details for catalog and purchases.
SuppliersPage.emptyDescription: Add suppliers to link them with catalog products.
SuppliersPage.confirmDeleteDescription: This action cannot be undone. It cannot be deleted if linked to products or purchase orders.
SuppliersPage.toastDeleteBlocked: Cannot delete supplier because it is linked to products or purchase orders in projects

CatalogPage.title: Product Catalog
CatalogPage.description: Products, references and costs to use in budgets.
CatalogPage.searchAria: Search products by name or reference
CatalogPage.emptyDescription: Add products to the catalog to use them in project budgets.
CatalogPage.confirmDeleteDescription: This action cannot be undone. It cannot be deleted if linked to a project.
CatalogPage.toastDeleteBlocked: Cannot delete product because it is linked to a project
CatalogPage.toastNoPermission: You do not have permission to delete this product
CatalogPage.toastDeleteFailed: Could not delete the product. Verify permissions and that the product is not linked to a project.

ProjectDetailPage.readOnlyDescription: You cannot edit data or add content.
ProjectDetailPage.upgradeHint: Some sections are not available in your plan.
